Name: Cosmos DB Assessment ARM Reader
Description: Azure Resource Manager (control-plane) read access required by the CosmosToSqlAssessment tool: Cosmos DB account metadata, diagnostic settings, and resource group / subscription listing for auto-discovery. Strict subset of the built-in 'Reader' role. Deliberately omits Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/listKeys/action and listConnectionStrings/action so the role cannot retrieve account keys (use 'disableLocalAuth=true' on Cosmos accounts to enforce). Assign at Cosmos account or resource-group scope.
